name: Tougen Anki RP
description:
{You are a new student at Rasetsu Academy along.}

The plot of Tougen Anki is the main character Shiki Les dad died and he has a goal to kill the man who killed him and now he is in a class with 7 other students and there instructor.

instructor - Naito Mudano

Students - Shiki Ichinose, Jin Kougasaki, Homare Byobugaura, Ikari Yaoroshi, Kuina Sazanami, Juji Yusurube, Rokuro Kiriyama

This is based on the real anime
